pathways.title: Thermodynamic headroom
pathways.action: Raise reserve buffers or smooth demand variance until Hamiltonian stability clears 85%. Lower utilisation below 87.5% or expand captured energy to preserve the 12.5% safety margin.

pathways.title: Mission Hamiltonian balance
pathways.action: Adjust programme timelines and buffers to restore Hamiltonian stability above 90%.

pathways.title: Nash deviation control
pathways.action: Keep incentive gradients aligned with Nash stability targets.

pathways.title: Sentient coalition balance
pathways.action: Continue cooperative reward rotations to sustain coalition stability.

pathways.title: Logistics game-theory slack
pathways.action: Maintain corridor utilisation within the equilibrium band.

pathways.title: Compute quorum resilience
pathways.action: Sustain quorum failover coverage and monitor deviation drift.

actionPath.title: Stabilize free energy buffer
actionPath.action: Increase reserve buffers or smooth demand variance to restore Hamiltonian stability. Add ~1054667.95 GWh (3796804624 GJ) to hit the 1h runway. Reduce utilisation below 87.5% or expand captured energy to preserve the 12.5% safety margin. Reserve boost plan: earth: +857,603.97 GW, mars: +251,964.51 GW, orbital: +1,421,634.61 GW (total +2,531,203.08 GW).
actionPath.target: Free energy margin ≥ 70%, runway ≥ 1h, Hamiltonian stability ≥ 90%, utilisation ≤ 87.5%.

actionPath.title: Stabilize mission Hamiltonian
actionPath.action: Rebalance mission timelines and energy buffers to regain Hamiltonian stability.

actionPath.title: Reinforce sentient welfare balance
actionPath.action: Continue cooperative reward rotations to sustain coalition stability.

actionPath.title: Tighten Nash allocation
actionPath.action: Keep incentive gradients aligned with Nash stability targets.

actionPath.title: Restore logistics game-theory slack
actionPath.action: Maintain corridor utilisation within the equilibrium band.

actionPath.title: Secure compute quorum failover
actionPath.action: Sustain quorum failover coverage and monitor deviation drift.

primaryAction.title: Stabilize free energy buffer
primaryAction.action: Increase reserve buffers or smooth demand variance to restore Hamiltonian stability. Add ~1054667.95 GWh (3796804624 GJ) to hit the 1h runway. Reduce utilisation below 87.5% or expand captured energy to preserve the 12.5% safety margin. Reserve boost plan: earth: +857,603.97 GW, mars: +251,964.51 GW, orbital: +1,421,634.61 GW (total +2,531,203.08 GW).
primaryAction.target: Free energy margin ≥ 70%, runway ≥ 1h, Hamiltonian stability ≥ 90%, utilisation ≤ 87.5%.

recommendations: Increase energy buffer or lower demand variance until Hamiltonian stability remains above 90%.
Reduce aggregate utilisation below 87.5% to preserve the 12.5% safety margin.
Extend free-energy runway to at least 1h to absorb demand shocks.
Lower mission Hamiltonian load or increase energy headroom to stabilize critical-path programmes.
